title: GTU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: GTU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Gujarat Technological University (GTU) Result 2026 out for DIPL 3rd Semester Regular and Remedial Dec 2025 Re-check Re-assess exams on the official website - gtu.ac.in on 13 Apr 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the GTU Diploma 3rd Sem result.

content.text: Gujarat Technological University (GTU) has officially released the GTU Exam Result 2026 for DIPL Semester 3 Regular and Remedial examinations of the Winter 2025 (Dec 2025) session after the Re-check Re-assess process. These latest GTU Diploma results provide updated marks for students of DIPL SEM 3 - Regular (DEC 2025) and DIPL SEM 3 - Remedial (DEC 2025) whose answer scripts were rechecked or reassessed as per their applications.

GTU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - gtu.ac.in, through the university’s result portal. Students can access the DIPL SEM 3 Regular and Remedial Re-check Re-assess results by visiting gturesults.in or the direct recheck links, entering their Enrollment Number and other required login details, and downloading the updated marksheet. After checking their revised scores, candidates should verify their name, enrollment number, semester, and subject-wise marks carefully, and contact GTU or their institute’s examination cell in case of any discrepancy.

GTU has updated its Winter 2025 re-check/re-assess results by publishing the DIPL Semester 3 Regular and Remedial Dec 2025 outcome on its official result portal as part of GTU Result 2026. These results form a part of the phased declaration of UG, PG and Diploma results for GTU Winter 2025 exams, giving diploma students an opportunity to view their corrected marks online.

rows: DIPL SEM 3 Regular (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-assess, DIPL SEM 3 Remedial (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-assess
Declared as part of GTU Result 2026

content.text: Gujarat Technological University has provided direct re-check/re-assess result links for DIPL SEM 3 Regular and DIPL SEM 3 Remedial Dec 2025 on its result server, in addition to the central result page at gtu.ac.in. Students can use the links below to open the appropriate re-check result page, enter their enrollment details, and instantly view or download their updated diploma 3rd semester marks.

links.label: Result of DIPL SEM 3 - Regular (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-Assess
Result of DIPL SEM 3 - Remedial (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-Assess
GTU Result Portal - All UG, PG, Diploma Winter 2025 Results

sections.heading: How to Download GTU DIPL SEM 3 Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check GTU Exam Result 2026 for DIPL Semester 3 Regular and Remedial Dec 2025 Re-check/Re-assess online.

items: Visit the GTU official result page at https://www.gtu.ac.in/result.aspx or directly open the re-check result server gturesults.in using the specific links.

On the result page, locate the Winter 2025 section and click on the link for "DIPL SEM 3 - Regular (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-Assess" or "DIPL SEM 3 - Remedial (DEC 2025) Re-check Re-Assess" as applicable.
The re-check result page (recheck.aspx) will open for the selected exam.
Enter your Enrollment Number and any additional details such as captcha/password as asked on the screen.
Click on the "Search", "Submit" or "View Result" button to fetch your updated DIPL SEM 3 result.
Check your name, enrollment number, course, semester and subject-wise marks, ensuring that the revised marks after re-check/re-assess are correctly reflected.
Download or print the updated marksheet and keep it safely until your institute issues the final consolidated mark sheet.
